query:
SELECT 
  id,
  variantCode,
  isDefault,
  status,
  createdAt
FROM product_variants
WHERE productId = 60016 AND isDefault = 1
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute SELECT 
  id,
  variantCode,
  isDefault,
  status,
  createdAt
FROM product_variants
WHERE productId = 60016 AND isDefault = 1
ORDER BY createdAt DESC;
